news.headline: X Financial (NYSE: XYF) to repurchase $48.7M shares from major shareholder on Dec. 16, 2024. Summary: Share repurchase worth $48.7M by X Financial from major shareholder.
news.summary: X Financial, a prominent online personal finance company in China, headquartered in Shenzhen, disclosed on December 19, 2024, about a repurchase deal made with a key shareholder on December 16, 2024. The deal, in line with NYSE trading under the symbol XYF, involved a significant number of shares being repurchased by the company.

news.headline: Strike involving 10,000+ grocery workers at Save Mart/Lucky/FoodMaxx narrowly averted with tentative contract agreement.
news.summary: More than 10,000 grocery workers at Save Mart/Lucky/FoodMaxx in Concord, Calif., narrowly avoided a strike as Union and management negotiators arrived at a tentative contract agreement at 1:30 a.m. The resolution came after extensive negotiations overseen by Federal Mediator Isael Hermosillo. UFCW 8-Golden State, along with UFCW Locals 5, 648, and 770, announced plans to present the agreement to Union members for feedback and approval.

news.headline: UnionPay International partners with Weixin Pay to enable more users of international UnionPay-powered e-wallets to make Weixin QR payments in China. Dec 17 collaboration announced.
news.summary: UnionPay International has partnered with Weixin Pay to allow more users of international UnionPay-powered e-wallets to make Weixin QR payments in mainland China. The collaboration, announced on December 17, 2024, opens up this payment option to a larger user base. This expansion is expected to significantly impact convenience for users, with an estimated increase of users and transactions using this service in the near future.

news.headline: AS Elenger Grupp approved by Competition Authority to acquire 100% shares in EWE Polska from EWE AG, operating in Poland.
news.summary: Elenger Grupp, a subsidiary of Infortar, and EWE AG have finalized a deal on October 31, 2024, wherein EWE AG will sell all shares (100%) of its subsidiary EWE Polska to Elenger Grupp. EWE Polska, based in Poland, oversees two subsidiaries - EWE Energia and EWE Przesył.

news.headline: Special coverage by China Daily celebrates Macao's return to China after 25 years. Live coverage ahead of anniversary.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, it will be the 25th anniversary of Macao's return to China. China Daily has started special live coverage two days before to honor Macao's progress and achievements since then. The coverage will delve into Macao's journey over the past 25 years.

news.headline: Bitcoin ETFs rise premarket despite Fed Chair Powell's statement on bank not accumulating BTC. ETFs incl Bitwise (BITB) +1.08%, ARK (ARKB) +1.41%, GBTC +1.32%, FBTC +1.04%, IBIT +1.26%. Fed cannot hold BTC legally. [Character count: 283]
news.summary: Bitcoin ETFs experienced a premarket surge despite Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's statement that the central bank has no intention of holding Bitcoin. The Bitwise Bitcoin ETF (NYSE:BITB) rose by 1.08%, ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF (BATS:ARKB) increased by 1.41%, Grayscale Bitcoin Trust (BTC) (NYSE:GBTC) saw a 1.32% climb, Fidelity Wise Origin Bitcoin Fund (BATS:FBTC) advanced by 1.04%, and iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (NASDAQ:IBIT) gained 1.26%. Powell, speaking post the Fed's recent policy meeting, reiterated that the central bank is prohibited from acquiring Bitcoin due to legal constraints.

news.headline: Putin: Practically all NATO nations are fighting against Russia.
Genethon's GNT0004 gene therapy for Duchenne muscular dystrophy approved for Phase 3 pivotal trials, a major milestone by 2024.
news.summary: In Paris, Genethon has announced that their gene therapy, GNT0004, designed for treating Duchene muscular dystrophy, has received approval to advance to Phase 3 pivotal trials. This development marks a significant milestone in research for this rare genetic disorder, affecting an estimated 1 in 3,500 to 5,000 male births globally. The trial will involve assessing the therapy's effectiveness and safety in a larger patient population, with high hopes for its potential impact on those suffering from the condition.

news.headline: Putin: I am ready to talk with Trump.
Putin: I haven't met Assad after he came to Moscow, but I'm planning to.

ASIC sues Binance for alleged consumer safeguard mishaps amid concerns over crypto derivatives' risk. "Correct classification is crucial," says official.
news.summary: An official from ASIC emphasized the importance of correctly categorizing retail clients due to the high risk and complexity associated with crypto derivative products. It is crucial to ensure proper classification for these products, as they can pose significant risks.

news.headline: Australian regulator sues Binance for alleged consumer protection failures amid risks of crypto derivatives.ASIC warns on proper client classification.
news.summary: An official from ASIC emphasized the significance of properly categorizing retail clients due to the risky and intricate nature of crypto derivative products. These products expose individuals to potential financial harm and require careful classification to ensure they are suitable for retail clients.ASIC underscores the importance of accurately identifying retail clients in order to protect them from the inherent risks associated with crypto derivative products.

news.headline: Anticimex Sweden upgrades to IFS Cloud to streamline service ops and increase efficiency. AI-powered platform to boost customer satisfaction.
news.summary: A renowned global pest control company will be utilizing IFS's AI-powered platform to enhance its service operations by standardizing processes and enhancing customer satisfaction. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024, in London by IFS, a prominent provider of enterprise cloud and Industrial AI software. This partnership aims to streamline operations and improve customer experience.

news.headline: Solana (SOL) price drops 9% in the past week due to overall crypto market weakness.
news.summary: Today, the price of Solana has decreased by 9% compared to last week, reflecting the ongoing weakness in the broader cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: HIGH Fitness launches new app blending 80s aerobics with modern innovation, offering 10-minute to 60-minute workouts.
news.summary: HIGH Fitness has introduced a fresh range of workouts on the App Store, catering to fast 10-minute blasts to intense 60-minute burners. Based in SALT LAKE CITY, Utah, the launch took place on Dec. 19, 2024, marking a significant milestone for the company. The new lineup includes cardio, strength, and stretch workouts that are both fun and easy to follow, catering to a wide range of fitness levels. This release has been highly anticipated and is expected to provide users with engaging and effective workout options.

news.headline: Rackspace Technology signs UK Armed Forces Covenant, reaffirming support for veterans and public sector.
news.summary: The commitment from Rackspace underscores their dedication to supporting military personnel, veterans, and their families.

news.headline: NBA player Luka Doncic launches foundation for youth basketball, aiming to bring back enjoyment for players.Characters: 96
news.summary: A renowned NBA player has expressed concerns about the lack of fun experienced by numerous youth basketball players. He aims to address this issue and improve the enjoyment of the sport for young individuals.

news.headline: KuCoin's "Light Up Africa" project in Ghana donates solar lamps benefiting 36,000 children.
news.summary: In Accra, Ghana, a donation ceremony was held on December 19, 2024, for the "Light Up Africa" Children's Solar Lamp Project. This initiative, a collaboration between KuCoin, Global CSR, and the Smiling Simon Greenbuild Foundation, aims to provide solar lamps to schoolchildren in Africa. The project seeks to offer light to improve educational opportunities for children in need.

news.headline: PractiTest wins 2024 Digital Innovator Award from Intellyx, celebrating 10 years, recognizing their innovative test solutions.
news.summary: In Rehovot, Israel on December 19, 2024, Intellyx, known for 10 years of expertise in analyzing digital transformation, declared PractiTest as the winner of the Winter 2024 Intellyx Digital Innovator Award. Celebrating their thought leadership and dedication to innovation, PractiTest, a prominent figure in advanced testing, stood out among competitors.
